message:
beads(jkcka): file jkcka.8 for full workspace migration; close jkcka.4

jkcka.3 added the typestate split ADDITIVELY — BoundVerified /
UnboundVerified / verify_bound / verify_unbound / promote_with_instance
ship alongside the legacy CryptographicallyVerified + verify() surface.
That let jkcka.3 land as a small reviewable change.

The full migration jkcka.4 originally scoped (rewriting 20 call sites
in fcp-core/{capability,connector,policy} + deleting the legacy
markers per AGENTS.md no-back-compat) is tracked as jkcka.8.
arch-int also blocks on jkcka.8 so the epic cannot close prematurely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
